# Bulauza Portfolio

Bulauza is an active software engineer working at a Tokyo-based Prime-listed company, specializing in high-quality Landing Page (LP) production and Web Development.

## Core Expertise
- **Frameworks**: Next.js (App Router), React, TypeScript.
- **Philosophy**: Maintenance-first approach, high performance, and rapid market entry (MVP).
- **Service**: Professional LP/Website development with focus on durability and user experience.

## Main Content
- **Mission**: Supporting business growth with "Solid Engineering Power".
- **Works**: Carousel of selected projects including "Oasis Life", "AnyMind Group", "Uzabase", and "FRACTA" (Note: These are demonstration samples).
- **Location**: Tokyo, Japan.
- **Language**: Japanese (Native), English.

## Visual Identity
Modern, professional, dark/light mode compatible editorial layout with fluid animations.

## Contact
Business inquiries via CloudWorks.
